--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -2,25 +2,28 @@
 
 ## Strategy
-- Pricing: A=$25, B=$59, C=$99. 
-- Individual: Plan A (T1), Plan B (T2), Plan C (T3).
-- Ops Spend: $500/day (Week 12-13) to clear backlog, then drop to $100/day.
-- Global Dev Spend: $100/day.
-- Ads: Search S1 ($80), Search S3 ($70), Social S3 ($50), LinkedIn E1 ($50).
-- Promotion: 15% lead promotion + 15% ongoing S3 discount.
-- Goal: Fix reputation by clearing support backlog. Start enterprise lead gen.
+- **Survival Mode**: Cash is very low ($15k). Burn reduced from $7k/week to ~$2k/week.
+- **Pricing**: 
+    - Plan A: $25 (Hold to stabilize S1).
+    - Plan B: $69 (Increase from $59).
+    - Plan C: $129 (Increase from $99).
+- **Promotions**: Removed ongoing 15% discount. Added 5% lead promotion.
+- **Spend**: 
+    - Ops: $100/day (Support backlog is clearing, 16 left).
+    - Dev: $100/day.
+- **Ads**: All targeted ads stopped (Saves $1.7k/week).
+- **Goal**: Reach cash-flow positive or survive until reputation recovers.
 
 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 12: 141 subs ($22,358 cash).
-- MRR: ~$5,000.
-- Weekly Net Burn: ~$4.3k (with $200 Ops).
-- Runway: ~5 weeks.
+- Week 13: 134 subs ($15,094 cash).
+- Churn: High in S1 (11 last week).
+- WTP: S1 ($25.86), S3 ($187.99).
+- ISM PMI: 46.1 (Contraction - avoid heavy enterprise spend for now).
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- Support issues are the main driver of negative sentiment.
-- S1 and S3 are price-happy but quality-sensitive on uptime/support.
-- RivalTech and ApexSaaS are improving quality (+0.10).
+- S1 is extremely price-sensitive and sensitive to support delays.
+- Support backlog was the main driver of negative sentiment in Week 12.
+- S3 is high-value and underpriced at $99.
 
 ## To Do
-- Check if support backlog is cleared next week.
-- Reduce Ops spend to $100/day once issues < 3.
-- Monitor LinkedIn E1 leads.
+- Re-evaluate ads once cash > $20k.
+- Monitor S1 churn after removing ongoing promotion.
